entries.title: mcp-preflight — static migration-readiness checker for the MCP 2026-07-28 spec
mcp-chaos — fault-injecting MCP proxy and agent resilience scorer
skill-collider — LLM-free static routing-collision analyzer for Agent Skills (SKILL.md)
context-xray - LLM-free static perception-gap scanner for MCP tool manifests & Agent Skills (invisible-Unicode smuggling, hidden markup, injection intent)
forkpoint - LLM-free behavioral fork-point analyzer that localizes where AI agents diverge across repeated same-task runs (OpenTelemetry gen_ai traces)

loadout - LLM-free budget-constrained progressive-disclosure planner for MCP tool manifests & Agent Skills (models eager-vs-deferred tool loading as a token-budget knapsack over static keep-eager signals; emits a deployable defer_loading plan + CI gate)

overreach - LLM-free static annotation-integrity auditor for MCP tool manifests (flags tools whose declared safety hints readOnlyHint/destructiveHint/idempotentHint/openWorldHint under-state actual behavior; emits per-tool auto-approval policy + trust score + CI gate)

contravene - LLM-free variance-aware breaking-change classifier for MCP tool contracts (classifies inputSchema/outputSchema evolution as MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH using input-contravariance vs output-covariance; computes required semver bump and fails CI when the declared version bump under-states it; also flags safety-hint downgrades and the outputSchema-vs-error-result validation collision)

trifecta - LLM-free static lethal-trifecta capability-flow analyzer for MCP toolsets (classifies each tool by direction x locus into the private/untrusted/exfil legs, detects when a toolset or cross-server bundle closes the exfiltration channel, computes the minimum-cost set of tools to gate to break it, emits provably trifecta-free per-task catalogs + risk score + CI gate)
